Container.Name: print-blockage-stopper
Container.Overview:
Automated maintenance prints for any network printer (especially pigment printers like Canon imagePROGRAF, Epson SureColor, HP DesignJet, etc.).
Sends a small test image on a configurable schedule (default: every 3 days) to keep all ink channels flowing and prevent costly pigment clogs and cleaning cycles. Works with any IPP-capable printer.
Includes a built-in CUPS server, GutenPrint drivers, test image, and cron scheduler — just point it at your printer's IP and go.
Container.Description: Keeps any network printer's print head healthy by automatically sending a small test print on a schedule. Prevents pigment ink clogs without wasting ink on full cleaning cycles. Works with Canon imagePROGRAF, Epson SureColor, HP DesignJet, and other IPP Everywhere compatible printers.
Container.Requires: Any network printer with IPP Everywhere support (usually any modern networked printer). Especially useful for pigment printers.
Container.Changes: ### 1.0.0 - Initial release - All 11 ink channels exercised with minimal-ink test image - Built-in CUPS + GutenPrint drivers - Configurable cron schedule - CUPS web UI for monitoring

Config.Name: Dashboard
Config.Description: Web dashboard with status, logs, and Print Now button.

Config.Name: CUPS Web UI
Config.Description: CUPS print server interface for advanced monitoring.

Config.Name: Printer IP Address
Config.Description: IP address of your printer on the local network. Find it in your router's DHCP list or on the printer under Settings → LAN Settings.

Config.Name: Print Schedule
Config.Description: Cron expression for how often to print. Default: every 3 days at 10 AM. Examples: '0 10 */4 * *' (every 4 days), '0 8 * * 1,4' (Mon+Thu at 8 AM).

Config.Name: Paper Size
Config.Description: Paper size loaded in the printer (e.g., A4, Letter, A3).

Config.Name: Connection Type
Config.Description: How to connect to the printer: 'ipp' (recommended) or 'socket' (port 9100).

Config.Name: Printer Port
Config.Description: Port for socket connection (only used when Connection Type is 'socket').

Config.Name: Skip If Printed Within (hours)
Config.Description: Skip the scheduled maintenance print if the printer had a real print job within this many hours. Default: 72 (3 days). Adjustable from the dashboard.

Config.Name: Data / Logs
Config.Description: Persistent storage for logs and CUPS configuration.

Config.Name: Unraid Notifications
Config.Description: Mount Unraid's notification script to get alerts on print failures. Leave default for standard Unraid installs.
